meta.title: 5 Days Kashmir Ski + Taj Mahal from Malaysia | Dhesu Travel & Tours
meta.description: 5-day tour with Kashmir Gulmarg gondola, Dal Lake houseboat and Taj Mahal at sunrise, domestic flight included. From RM2798 per person.
meta.keywords: 5 Days Kashmir Ski + Taj Mahal from Malaysia, India tour package, Kashmir tour package Malaysia, Dhesu travel

hero.title: 5 Days, Kashmir & the Taj.
hero.titleAccent: Snowy Peaks and India's Greatest Monument.
hero.intro: Two of India's absolute icons in one trip: the snow and meadows of Kashmir's Gulmarg, and the Taj Mahal at sunrise. Mountains and marble, paradise and poetry, linked by a quick domestic flight.
hero.heroImageAlt: Kashmir Gulmarg snow and Taj Mahal combination

overview.heading: 5 Days Kashmir Ski + Taj Mahal: The Full Picture
body: This trip pairs the two experiences most travellers dream of in India: the alpine beauty of Kashmir and the Taj Mahal. You begin in the Srinagar valley with Dal Lake and the Gulmarg gondola, then fly south to see the Taj Mahal at sunrise, with a taste of Delhi too.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, this 5 day Kashmir and Taj Mahal package includes the domestic flight and a private vehicle with driver guide at each end. It is the ideal combination for a first big India trip, capturing both the mountains and the country's most famous monument.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: The Gulmarg Gondola
items.body: One of the highest cable cars in the world, rising towards the Apharwat peak with stunning views over snow and meadow. World-class skiing in winter.

items.title: The Taj Mahal at Sunrise
items.body: See the Taj Mahal glow at dawn, the white marble shifting through pink and gold. One of travel's truly unforgettable moments.

items.title: Dal Lake & a Houseboat Night
items.body: A shikara ride and a night on a traditional Dal Lake houseboat, framed by the gardens and peaks of the Srinagar valley.

days.title: Arrive Srinagar, Houseboat
days.description: Met at Srinagar airport and transferred to your Dal Lake houseboat. Evening shikara ride.

days.title: Gulmarg Excursion
days.description: Drive to Gulmarg for the gondola and mountain scenery.

days.title: Fly Srinagar to Delhi, Drive to Agra
days.description: Domestic flight to Delhi, then drive to Agra for the night.

days.title: Taj Mahal Sunrise, Agra Fort, Delhi
days.description: Sunrise at the Taj, Agra Fort, then back to Delhi for sightseeing.

days.title: Depart Delhi
days.description: Checkout and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

whyBook.heading: Mountains and Marble, Perfectly Linked
whyBook.body: Pairing Kashmir with the Taj means coordinating a flight and timing the Taj at sunrise. We handle the logistics so two bucket-list experiences flow into one smooth trip. Dhesu has arranged India tours for over 35 years.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: Kashmir & Taj Mahal Tour from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 5 day package combines two of India's greatest experiences: the alpine beauty of Kashmir and the Taj Mahal at sunrise. The domestic flight links the valley and the plains efficiently.

You get the Gulmarg gondola, Dal Lake and a houseboat night, then the Taj Mahal, Agra Fort and a taste of Delhi. It is the ultimate first-time India combination.

A private vehicle and driver guide at each end ensure smooth, flexible travel throughout.

sections.heading: Timing the Taj Mahal
sections.body:
We always aim for a sunrise visit to the Taj Mahal, when the light is softest and the crowds smallest. The marble appears to change colour through the early hours, a magical sight.

The Taj is closed on Fridays, so we plan your itinerary around that. After the snow and meadows of Kashmir, the contrast of the Taj's marble perfection is striking.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Srinagar and Delhi Airports (SXR / DEL). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: Is the domestic flight included?
items.answer: Yes. This package includes the domestic flight from Srinagar to Delhi, linking the Kashmir valley with Agra and the Taj Mahal. International flights are not included.

items.question: What is the best time for this trip?
items.answer: April to October is ideal for Kashmir, while October to March is best for Agra and Delhi. Spring and autumn offer good weather in both regions. Winter brings snow to Gulmarg and the most atmospheric (if occasionally misty) light at the Taj.

items.question: Is the Gulmarg gondola included?
items.answer: The package includes the Gulmarg excursion. The gondola ticket has a separate cost, which we can include or advise on. We confirm all inclusions when you book and recommend timing for the clearest mountain views.
